---
title: "Annie Adams"
image: images/headshot.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 10cm
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/annaliese-adams/
      icon: linkedin
    - text: Github
      href: https://github.com/annieradams
      icon: github
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:aradams@ucsb.edu
      icon: envelope-fill
---

### Hi there! Welcome to my website!

My name is Annie Adams! I am a recent graduate of the Master of Environmental Data Science program at the University of California, Santa Barbara. I am extremely motivated by environmental data and how it can assist in reducing the climate crisis. When I am not behind a computer, I love to hike, cycle, explore new countries, and bikepack! Check out the rest of my website to learn more about me and see what I have been up to!
